headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -80.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 70% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 167 quotes and a striking 120 at strong intensity, driving the score to 77.7 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This puts frustrations in the upper half of their 152-day range (max 165.6), suggesting a notably heated but not record-breaking day.
• Fears recovered sharply from yesterday's low of -50.5 to -7.5, while optimism also improved, though both remain in negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
